chunks.text: He locked the door. I was scared. I had worked there since January at the Sector 17 office.
Then in March he started messaging me at night. Phir usne kaha ki agar bataya toh naukri chali jayegi.
Before he came to the office that day, I had called my sister. The next morning I could not sleep.
Finally I went to the police station with my counselor. I want him stopped. I do not want to repeat everything again and again.
